title: Workflows in Quarters — read-only scan of .claude/workflows + ~/.claude/workflows (empty-state-first, fixture-tested) + workflows as router `workflow` targets

tests.summary: 5 passed — empty-state: no workflows dirs → [] (graceful, the dirs don't exist on CLI 2.1.175); lists a fixture workflow + renders its script (non-script files ignored); project workflows shadow user workflows of the same name (quarters-workflows-ok); scanned workflows map to router `workflow` targets {id:workflow:<name>,type:workflow,...} (workflow-target-ok); empty scan → empty dropdown, no crash. Full suite 601 passed / 9 skipped / 0 failed.

e2e.summary: N/A — read-only scanner + target mapping; committed fixture test is the gate. The visible Quarters panel reuses the existing read-only PrimitiveListPanel idiom (deferred, see blocker).

by: N/A — backend scanner; panel reuses existing idiom

video.note: Backend slice; the Workflows panel, when wired, films with the consolidated MR-wave walkthrough.

blockers: The visible Quarters Workflows PANEL (category registry entry + GET route + PrimitiveListPanel wiring) is deferred as a thin read-only follow-up reusing the existing C1-mcp template idiom — the load-bearing scan + target-mapping + empty-state are committed + fixture-tested here (the dirs are empty on this install, so the panel would render the empty state). Logged, not silently dropped.
notes: src/lib/workflows-scan.ts scans .claude/workflows (project) + ~/.claude/workflows (user) read-only, ignoring non-script files, with project shadowing user (Claude Code precedence) and a graceful empty-state (the dirs don't exist on CLI 2.1.175 — empty-state-first + fixture-tested per the brief). workflowTargets() maps scanned workflows → Model Router `workflow` targets so saved workflows appear in the router's target dropdown (the routing config already supports the `workflow` target type from MR1a). Read-only + (future) delete only, no JS-as-portable-format adoption (explicitly out of scope). Satisfies brief §3 tokens quarters-workflows-ok + workflow-target-ok.
